allow: Bash(powershell -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Build a clinic manager overview dashboard that shows real-time clinic activity for today. The overview should display: List of all appointments scheduled for today, each patient name, assigned physiotherapist, appointment time, current status \(upcoming, in-progress, completed\). Each item should include a button to navigate directly to the patient sheet to view treatment program and details." -Json -ShortName "clinic-manager-dashboard" "Clinic Manager Today Dashboard")
